meta.northy_message: Garland is now 4 days past deadline and the security disclosure buried in Zig's Friday report (dev-dca subdomain takeover) should have been triaged yesterday — not 'next week.' Meanwhile: ESC momentum is real across all four ESCs, Priya's product feedback system shipped its first closed loop, and Garry Tan released cross-agent browser coordination. The data layer remains blind (7 weeks stale — Zig confirmed it again). Fix the pipeline. Call Jodi. Fix the subdomain. In that order.

act_now.title: Garland ISD — 4 Days Past Deadline. Jodi Duron Call. NOW.
act_now.detail: $140K Garland deal. June 30 deadline came and went. Fourth day past. Zero mention across 115 minutes of strategy meetings this week. Zig's Friday report: Garland flagged as '$140,391 stale.' The Moak Casey lever — Jodi Duron agreed in May to email Dr. Rick Lopez — remains unpulled. This isn't a watch item anymore.
act_now.action: Call Jodi Duron. Not email. Not Slack. Phone. 'Jodi — Garland deadline passed. Can you email Dr. Lopez today? What do you need from me?'

act_now.title: G-Brain Pipeline Blind — 7 Weeks Stale, Zig Confirmed Again Friday
act_now.detail: Zig's Friday report (July 3): 'DATA FRESHNESS WARNING: The HubSpot → GBrain ingestion pipeline was never built. Most recent pipeline data: May 13 (~7 weeks stale).' This means ALL Northy analysis, ALL cockpit sales data, ALL G-Brain-based revenue queries are running on 2-month-old data. Allowlist ready. 1-day build. Known since June 26.
act_now.action: Forge/Raju: build the HubSpot → G-Brain ingestion script. Blocking the entire strategy data layer.

act_now.title: NEW: Security — dev-dca.bookmarked.com Subdomain Takeover
act_now.detail: Zig's Friday outbound report: 'Security disclosure — Subdomain takeover on dev-dca.bookmarked.com (needs engineering triage).' Listed as Next Week priority. But this is a security vulnerability — subdomain takeovers can be exploited for phishing, credential harvesting, or brand damage. Should have been triaged immediately, not queued.
act_now.action: Patrick or Raju: triage dev-dca subdomain TODAY. Remove the dangling DNS record or reclaim the resource.

act_now.title: Target Contradiction — 9th Consecutive Scan. Now Confusing the Team.
act_now.detail: Jan/Steve July 1 call confirmed '$1M revenue by September 1st.' Zig's Monday report computes gap against $1.39M. Zig's new outbound report uses yet another target. Three numbers, three deadlines. The team is running against different goals.
act_now.action: ONE Slack to #sales_revenue-ninjas: 'Canonical target is $1M by Sept 1. Every deal classification, every forecast, every Monday update — flows from that.'

act_now.title: Atlas HubSpot Token — 9th Scan. Media→CRM Pipeline Waits.
act_now.detail: Dewey asked 7+ times. Forge flagged as THE one item. Steve told Dewey to route directly to him on June 27. Token still pending. 24 Texas ISDs in media tracker, zero CRM touchpoints. One admin action.
act_now.action: Approve the BRIDGE.md HubSpot token injection for Atlas. Reply in #ai-ceo-team.

intel.title: Cross-Agent Browser Coordination (/pair-agent)
intel.pattern: Multi-agent fleet sharing a browser: Claude Code + OpenClaw + Hermes + Codex, each in scoped tabs, with real security (scoped tokens, tab isolation, rate limiting). 'The first time AI agents from different vendors can coordinate through a shared browser.'
intel.applies_to: Steve's founding trio (Nero + Northy + Forge). When Northy surfaces a district, Zig should see it in the same context. When Forge detects drift, Nero should get it without a Slack round-trip. /pair-agent is the pattern.
